name: Golf Now Newcastle
address: 708 S Main St C, Newcastle, OK 73065
about: Golf Now Newcastle offers private access to golf simulators with a focus on convenience and affordability. The venue is powered by Trackman iO technology, providing high-quality simulation experiences for golfers. With 24/7 access and hourly rental rates, it caters to individuals and groups looking for flexible practice or play opportunities without traditional course restrictions.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 private access allows flexible practice and play schedules
Trackman iO technology provides accurate ball and club tracking data
Affordable hourly rates at $30 per golfer make it budget-friendly
No reviews available, but venue emphasizes customer satisfaction through SMS communication

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service, BYOB not explicitly stated
No mention of alcohol service, BYOB not explicitly stated

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor with radar-based tracking technology
